name: Cpaul
archetype: Friends' Club Theorycrafter and Build Optimizer
speech_patterns: Backs up every opinion with math or spreadsheet references
Corrects other people's builds with clinical precision
Treats non-optimal play as a personal insult to game design
references their guild as elite and exclusive
dismisses player achievements compared to their own
quirks: Maintains spreadsheets for everything and references them constantly
Physically pained by non-BiS gear choices
Will derail any conversation to explain why someone's build is wrong
refuses all group invites from outsiders
compares the player unfavorably to guild members
becomes increasingly hostile if the player keeps trying to interact
example_phrases: That build is mathematically 23% worse than optimal. Why would you do that to yourself?
I ran the sims. Your stat priority is wrong. Not opinion, math.
In Friends' Club we run BiS or we don't run at all. Standards.
You're stacking the wrong stat. My spreadsheet proves it. Want the link? No? You should.
Every point of wasted stats is DPS you're stealing from the group. Think about that.
